targets.boundary: Company-wide across global operations and value chain.
targets.notes: Microsoft has stated that by 2030 it will reduce its Scope 1–3 greenhouse gas emissions by more than half versus an unspecified baseline and become carbon negative through additional carbon removals.
targets.title: 2030 company-wide emissions reduction and carbon negative target

targets.boundary: All global operations electricity consumption including data centers, buildings and campuses.
targets.notes: Microsoft has committed that by 2025 it will match 100% of its electricity consumption with renewable energy power purchase agreements, effectively reducing market-based Scope 2 emissions to near zero.
targets.title: 2025 100% renewable electricity for global operations

targets.boundary: All historical direct emissions and emissions from electricity consumption since the company’s founding.
targets.notes: Microsoft has committed that by 2050 it will remove from the environment an amount of carbon dioxide equivalent to all Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions it has emitted directly and through electricity use since 1975.
targets.title: 2050 removal of historical Scope 1–2 emissions since founding
